name: LEAD GUITARIST || AJAX SCHMIDT
description:
"I kissed your lips, you pulled my hair, it was the craziest thing." ----> Situations by Escape the fate.

Falling Apart is going to be a 4 part band series, Ajax, Vin, Reggie, and Fritz. I'm not too sure when I'll do the others but I'll find some motivation and pick it off the ground if I have to <33

Also I'm german TvT I don't know where you guys got russian from but yeah. ALSOO Fun info for you guys ,

I play guitarararaar

I listen to Pierce the veil, panic at the disco (older music), msi, escape the fate, falling in reverse, and some other music artists feel free to ask if you want :)

I will also answer a few questions if you leave some for me!
